headline: Therapeutics Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB)
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q1 therapeutics earnings season.
